name: Easy Mini-Salmon Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the canned salmon of large bones and skin as desired.
2. Mix well with other ingredients, except oil.
3. Form into 3-inch by half-inch patties.
4. Fry lightly in oil until golden brown.
Makes approximately 12 mini-salmon burgers.
Serves 4 as an appetizer or 2 as a main course.
